message:
fix(pipeline): relax read-back verification to tolerate lossy role round-trips

Claude Code's JSONL format maps System, Tool, and Other roles to "user"
entries. When reading back a written session, these roles become
MessageRole::User, causing a spurious mismatch against the original role
in readback_mismatch_detail(). This broke Codex→Claude Code conversions
(and any conversion where the source session contained non-User/Assistant
roles).

Introduce readback_role_bucket() which groups roles into equivalence
classes matching the target format's expressiveness: Assistant stays
distinct, while User/System/Tool/Other all map to the same "user"
bucket. The verification comparison now uses these buckets instead of
strict equality.

Fixes #2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
